text:
Reunion of the Fallen is the 35th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

With everyone reeling after the fight between Ed and Greed, Lust can't shake two questions from her mind. Where did she come from? And where will she go when she is dead? As if to answer, she sees a familiar man in a crowd. Years ago, she helped him use alchemy to combat a strange plague that was turning villagers into stone. And his mere presence produces unexplainable memories of a former life.

Episode Notes

This episode reveals more of the connection that Lust has to the lover of Scar's brother, whom she is modeled after due to sharing her memories. The secret of the locket that Scar picked up from the lover's grave will be revealed five episodes later in Episode 40.
This is the first episode in which we see Lust (or any homunculus) dealing with flashbacks of past lives. It arguably marks the beginning of Lust's change as a character that leads to her eventual betrayal of both her comrades and her master.
Despite the grim outcome of this episode, the people of the village and the events that took place there are never referenced again for the remainder of the series. This is especially jarring as the subsequent episode, The Sinner Within, has the Elric brothers reminisce on many of the people they had met who died during their journey.
From a storytelling perspective, Lujon and his village may have been intentionally not brought up to instead focus on events and characters the viewer hasn't seen in awhile, rather than focusing on events that are more likely to be fresh in the viewer's mind.
From a character perspective, it could be due to the brothers lacking context for what happened at the village, being totally unaware of the presence of the homunculi and only briefly getting to know the villagers before they succumbed to fossil disease.
